creator: flo@kasimir.com
text:
On 5/17/10 2:00 PM, Stefan Walter wrote:
> Hi Florian,
>

Hi Stefan,

> you update for net/asterisk16-addons to version 1.6.1.0 has been around
> for quite a while already, but net/asterisk16 is still at 1.6.0.x. Given
> that and the fact that ports/144065 and ports/144066 with updates to more
> recent versions are in the queue now, too, can this PR be closed?
>

Yes, i guess this is the best way to proceed. I left this PR open as i 
didn't and still don't know if sobomax was/is going to commit astersik 
1.6.1.x or 1.6.2.x.

I'm fine with this PR being closed.

Cheers,
Florian
